steps.title: Compare weighted sums
steps.content: Both data sets have $27$ values, so comparing their means is the same as comparing their weighted sums.

steps.title: Choose the greater mean
steps.content: Since both sums are divided by the same total, $27$, the larger weighted sum gives the larger mean. Because $1{,}094>958$, data set A has the greater mean. The answer is A.
